description: DRY vs COUPLED contact probe seated on exaggerated rough steel. Left: hatched TRAPPED AIR pockets, incident pulse folding back >99.9% (NO TEST) + magnified thin-AIR-layer inset. Right: thin cyan water film floods every valley (COUPLANT / THIN WATER FILM), ≈12% IN / ≈88% BACK energy split, beam to backwall, echo + signal blip = live test.
